title: DRDO GTRE – Apprentice Trainees – 150 Posts

basic_details.job_title: DRDO GTRE Apprentice Trainees Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 150 Posts
basic_details.short_information: DRDO GTRE Apprentice Trainees Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 150 vacancies across Karnataka. Candidates with Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in interview on 06-06-2026. For detailed information please visit DRDO GTRE official website, drdo.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE), Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Ministry of Defence, Govt. of India
basic_details.post_name: Apprentice Trainees – Technical Entry (Graduate Engineering, Diploma Engineering, ITI Trades) and Non-Technical Graduate General
basic_details.application_mode: Walk-in Interview (No online application on GTRE website)

age_limit.age_details: Character & antecedents verification and Certificate of Physical Fitness from authorised Medical Officer of any Government Hospital before commencement of training

selection_process: Shortlisting on basis of academic merit / written test / interview or combination thereof, subject to document verification
how_to_apply: Candidates must attend the walk-in interview on 6th June 2026 (Saturday) at Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE), DRDO, CV Raman Nagar, Bengaluru – 560093. There is no online application form on the GTRE/DRDO website. Prior registration on the respective portal (NATS or NAPS) is mandatory before attending the walk-in interview.
seo_tags: Gas Turbine Research Establishment Apprentice Trainees Recruitment 2026
